title: Hollow Knight
synopsis: A challenging action-adventure game set in a vast underground kingdom of insects and heroes.

title: Celeste
synopsis: Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain.

title: Hades
synopsis: Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash your way out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler.

title: Stardew Valley
synopsis: Build the farm of your dreams in this open-ended country-life RPG.

title: Dead Cells
synopsis: A rogue-lite, Metroidvania-inspired action platformer set in a sprawling, ever-changing castle.

title: Disco Elysium
synopsis: A groundbreaking role playing game. You're a detective with a unique skill system and a whole city to explore.

title: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove
synopsis: A love letter to classic games, featuring multiple campaigns and a vast cast of colorful characters.

title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
synopsis: Embark on an all-new adventure in a vast world full of wonder, danger and mystery in this sequel to Ori and the Blind Forest.

title: Cuphead
synopsis: A classic run and gun action game focused on boss battles, with stunning 1930s cartoon visuals.

title: Into the Breach
synopsis: Control powerful mechs from the future to defend against an alien threat in this turn-based strategy game.

title: Return of the Obra Dinn
synopsis: A 1-bit mystery game set aboard a ghost ship. Solve the fate of every crew member using a magical pocket watch.

title: Spelunky 2
synopsis: Dig through the world and discover its many secrets in this challenging, rogue-like platformer.

title: Undertale
synopsis: A role-playing game where you don't have to kill anyone. Make friends with monsters or spare them.

title: Axiom Verge
synopsis: Explore and combat alien landscapes in this 2D sci-fi action-adventure inspired by classic Metroid games.

title: Katana ZERO
synopsis: A stylish neo-noir action platformer featuring breakneck action and a unique time-manipulation mechanic.

title: Night in the Woods
synopsis: An adventure game focused on exploration, story, and character, featuring a cast of fully-realized characters.

title: Hyper Light Drifter
synopsis: Explore a beautiful, haunting world full of ruins and monsters in this action RPG.

title: Blasphemous
synopsis: A punishing action-platformer set in a grim, gothic world full of disturbing imagery and intense combat.

title: Fez
synopsis: A puzzle-platformer where you can rotate a 2D world in 3D, uncovering new paths and secrets.

title: Hotline Miami
synopsis: A high-octane top-down shooter with hyper-violent gameplay set in the brutal criminal underworld of 1989 Miami.

title: Kerbal Space Program
synopsis: Take charge of the space program for the alien race known as the Kerbals and build rockets to explore the cosmos.

title: Terraria
synopsis: Dig, fight, explore, build! A 2D sandbox adventure with over a decade of free updates and content.

title: Factorio
synopsis: Build and manage automated factories on an alien planet, defend against hostile wildlife, and launch a rocket.

title: Slay the Spire
synopsis: Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics, and fight your way to the top of the Spire.

title: Pyre
synopsis: Lead your band of exiles to freedom through ancient rituals in this party-based RPG.

title: Bastion
synopsis: An action RPG with a rich reactive narrator set in a vibrant fantasy world torn apart by a catastrophic event.

title: Transistor
synopsis: Take up the Transistor and cut a path through a reactionary military force in a futuristic city.

title: Outer Wilds
synopsis: Explore a solar system stuck in an endless time loop. Unravel the mystery of a lost ancient civilization.

title: A Short Hike
synopsis: A peaceful outdoor adventure game about hiking to the top of a mountain at your own pace.

title: Baba Is You
synopsis: A puzzle game where the rules are objects you can move and manipulate to solve mind-bending levels.

title: CrossCode
synopsis: Explore a massive online role-playing game set in the far future in this fast-paced retro sci-fi action RPG.

title: Neon Abyss
synopsis: Descend into the Abyss in this intense roguelite action platformer featuring auto-growing items.

title: Enter the Gungeon
synopsis: A bullet hell dungeon crawler following a band of misfits seeking to shoot their way to a legendary gun.

title: Rogue Legacy 2
synopsis: Venture into a never-ending fantasy castle as one of many heroic descendants in this genealogical roguelite.

title: Darkest Dungeon
synopsis: A challenging gothic roguelike turn-based RPG about the psychological stresses of adventuring.

title: Moonlighter
synopsis: An action RPG with rogue-lite elements following Will, an aspiring hero who keeps a shop between adventures.

title: Tunic
synopsis: Explore a land full of lost legends, ancient powers, and ferocious monsters as a small fox in a big world.

title: Loop Hero
synopsis: Place cards around the loop to restore the world and defeat the Lich in this unique roguelite.

title: Spiritfarer
synopsis: A cozy management game about dying where you play a ferry master for the deceased in an afterlife.

title: Unpacking
synopsis: A zen puzzle game about the familiar experience of unpacking boxes and finding a home for your things.

title: Risk of Rain 2
synopsis: Escape a chaotic alien planet by fighting through hordes of frenzied monsters in this third-person roguelite shooter.

title: Prodeus
synopsis: A first-person shooter of old, evolved. Rip and tear through hordes of enemies with visceral, screen-shaking gameplay.

title: Vampire Survivors
synopsis: Mow down thousands of night creatures and survive until dawn in this gothic horror casual game.

title: Dave the Diver
synopsis: A casual adventure RPG featuring deep-sea exploration during the day and sushi restaurant management at night.

title: Pizza Tower
synopsis: A fast-paced 2D platformer inspired by the Wario Land series, featuring frenetic movement and expressive hand-drawn art.

title: Cassette Beasts
synopsis: Collect and transform into monsters using magical cassette tapes to survive on the strange island of New Wirral.

title: Ultrakill
synopsis: Mankind is dead. Blood is fuel. Hell is full. A fast-paced FPS combining old-school mechanics with modern sensibilities.

title: Tactics Ogre: Reborn
synopsis: A remaster of the legendary tactical RPG with revised mechanics, an expanded soundtrack, and improved visuals.

title: Doki Doki Literature Club Plus
synopsis: A psychological horror visual novel disguised as a cute high school dating sim. Not for the faint of heart.

title: Webbed
synopsis: A cute spider game where you swing around with a web, befriend spiders, and rescue your boyfriend from a big bad bird.
